cards.front: What is the primary purpose of a client-server program in this context?
cards.back: To enable the client to receive the contents of a requested file from the server

cards.front: What protocol is typically used for file transfer between a client and server?
What type of data does the client need to send to the server to initiate a file transfer?
cards.back: The file name of the requested file

cards.front: What type of data does the server need to send back to the client to confirm the file transfer?
cards.back: ACKnowledgement (ACK) and the contents of the requested file

cards.front: What is the primary function of the server in this context?
cards.back: To store and provide access to files upon request from clients
